title: Skillmatics Dot It Sticker Art - Disney Princess, Mess-Free Fun for Kids, 500+ Stickers, Craft Kits, DIY Scrapbooking Activity, Travel Toys, Gifts for Girls & Boys Ages 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
features: PERFECT STICKERING ART ACTIVITY: With over 500 easy-to-peel stickers, your child will use their fine motor skills and imagination to complete 8 Disney princess-themed pictures featuring Cinderella, Ariel, Jasmine, Moana, and more!
INCLUDES: 30 easy-to-peel, colored sticker sheets (500+ stickers), 4 double-sided canvases, and an instruction manual.
HOW TO USE: Let your child choose their favourite coloured stickers, peel them off, and paste them onto the canvases to bring the picture to life!
NO GLUE, NO MESS!: Dot It! is the perfect stickering, no-mess art activity that keeps kids engaged at home, playdates, art classes, or on the go!

DEVELOP KEY SKILLS: While having fun, children develop essential skills like creative expression, pincer grasp, hand-eye coordination, and bilateral hand coordination. It's an engaging way for them to grow and learn!
ENCOURAGES INDEPENDENT PLAY: A fun way for kids to play independently, while sparking their imagination and enjoying hours of creative fun!
BEST GIFT EVER!: Makes an ideal gift for children aged 3 to 7 that love Disney princesses!
VERSATILE AND PORTABLE: Whether at home or on the go, this kit is perfect for providing creative entertainment. It comes with everything needed to unleash your child's artistic potential.
